# <type>(<scope>): <short summary>
#
# Body: explain why the change is needed and what changed.
# Footer: reference issues or breaking changes when applicable.
#
# Types:
#   feat      New user-facing capability
#   fix       Bug fix
#   docs      Documentation only
#   style     Formatting only, no behavior change
#   refactor  Code restructuring without behavior change
#   perf      Performance improvement
#   test      Test-only change
#   build     Build system, packaging, dependencies
#   ci        CI/CD configuration
#   chore     Maintenance
#   rules     Client/server Mod rule updates
#   release   Versioning and release metadata
#
# Examples:
#   feat(serverpack): generate optimized batch startup scripts
#   fix(rules): exclude lightspeed from Forge serverpacks
#   docs(readme): add CurseForge API key setup notes
#
# Keep the first line under 72 characters.
# Use imperative mood: "add", "fix", "remove", not "added" or "fixes".
